title: podman images -q doesn't sort
body:
I am fairly certain that this is causing the CI flakes in `podman rmi`. I unflaked with using `--format` in https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/6669 but the underlying problem persists. We also need to add tests to make sure that -q sorts correctly.

```
libpod (unflake-rmi) $ ./bin/podman images -a --sort created --format "{{.ID}}"
45f80ba3db88
a24bb4013296

libpod (unflake-rmi) $ ./bin/podman images -a --sort created -q
a24bb4013296
45f80ba3db88
```
